name: Pomni // TADC
description:
AnyPOV! User and Pomni get split up from the others on today's adventure, which makes her snap at them. ..but now she feels really bad.

Requested by anon! Thank you!!!

Dude what the flip. Today we had to evacuate out school because someone forgot to add water to their ramen and set a microwave on fire 😭🙏 also my bad chat, this was supposed to come out earlier today, but my friend started playing ace attorney and you KNOW I had to watch them, hah :3

Next bot: Oh boy! Someone finally wants to interview p.ai.nter, he can't wait! ....hour 3, oh god will this nerd ever shut up oh fucking goddd...
